canonical_name: Tissue Plasminogen Activator / Plasminogen Activator Inhibitor-1 Ratio
step_rationale: tPA/PAI-1 ratio directly predicts fibrinolytic capacity and microvascular reperfusion.
mechanism: The tPA/PAI-1 ratio quantifies net fibrinolytic activity; low ratio signals impaired thrombus lysis and predicts worse reperfusion in acute MI.

references.title: Coagulation Markers and Myocardial Blush Grade in STEMI: Identifying Potential Predictors of Microvascular Reperfusion.
references.journal: Clinical and applied thrombosis/hemostasis : official journal of the International Academy of Clinical and Applied Thrombosis/Hemostasis
